name: Feedzai
description: Feedzai — ML-powered financial risk platform detecting payment fraud, money laundering, and account takeover in real time.

seo.title: Feedzai — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: Feedzai: Feedzai — ML-powered financial risk platform detecting payment fraud, money laundering, and account takeover in real time.

when_to_use: ML-based payment fraud scoring for real-time authorization
AML transaction monitoring for neobank regulatory compliance
Account takeover detection via multi-signal risk fusion
Card-present and CNP fraud differentiation for issuers
BSA/AML model fairness reporting for regulatory exams

pros: Unified platform for fraud, AML and ATO
Proven at very large bank volumes
Strong case management and analyst tooling
cons: Enterprise sales and six-to-nine month rollouts
License costs high relative to ROI for mid-market
Steep learning curve for risk analysts
review.verdict: Serious ML platform for big banks, but the TCO and implementation scope make it wrong for smaller players.
review.best_for: Large banks and acquirers unifying payment fraud, AML and ATO on one engine.
review.not_for: Neobanks or fintechs wanting a fast API-first AML or fraud stack.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.

lock_in.reason: Enterprise ML platform, deep integration lock-in
